title: bigelovia pusilla
intro: Bigelovia pusilla, also known as the little ladies' nightcap, is a flowering plant in the honeysuckle family native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bigelovia pusilla include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief for skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
